attacking_style: Not an attacker. Pure sprinter relying on final 300m speed, often forced into reactive freelance sprints when leadout fractures.
team_tactics: Insufficient team support evident across observations; poor positioning into finals (5km out) and absent/fractured leadout trains forcing solo efforts.
terrain_preference: Flat, technical-free sprint finishes. Severely exposed on descents (especially wet) and roads requiring precise positioning skills.
vulnerability: Technical descents in wet conditions cause significant time loss. Poor positioning into sprint finals. Struggles when leadouts fracture, forcing reactive freelance sprints.
key_patterns: Consistently poor positioning entering finals, multiple observations show far back placement with 5km remaining.
Leadout trains fractured or absent across observations, forced into reactive sprint tactics behind rivals.
Technical weakness on descents: lost 2+ minutes solo in wet conditions, age-related handling concerns.
Veteran decline pattern: team support deficit suggests reduced status, struggles in pure speed contests.
form_trajectory: negative: 2020 showed technical vulnerabilities (descent struggles), ongoing positioning deficits, and diminished team investment in leadout support
